items.title: What is SKIP LOCKED for in PostgreSQL 9.5?
items.description: PostgreSQL 9.5 introduces a new SKIP LOCKED option to SELECT ... FOR [KEY] UPDATE|SHARE. It’s used in the same place as NOWAIT and, like NOWAIT, affects behaviour when the tuple is locked by another transaction. The main utility of SKIP LOCKED is for building simple, reliable and efficient concurrent work queues. Most work queue implementations […]
